Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 140 

LINE_NUM_ADJ 

LABEL: Adjustment Claim Line Number 

DESCRIPTION: A unique number to identify the transaction line number that is being reported on the adjustment 
internal control number (ICN). 

SHORT NAME: LINE_NUM_ADJ 

LONG NAME: LINE_NUM_ADJ 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): All line files 

VALUES: Valid characters in the text
